bullets.text: Three people have died on the MV Hondius cruise ship amid a suspected hantavirus outbreak, prompting Cape Verde to block the vessel from docking to protect public health.
Two people were killed and several injured after a car was driven into a crowd in Leipzig, Germany, leading to the detention of a 33-year-old German citizen.
Three Russian diplomats have been expelled from Austria over accusations of spying, reportedly gathering information using antennas on diplomatic buildings.
Three people have died and four Australians are among the passengers on a luxury cruise ship currently held off the coast of Cape Verde due to a suspected hantavirus outbreak.
Three people were killed when a rescue boat overturned in heavy conditions off the NSW coast while responding to a yacht in distress.
Jefferson Lewis has appeared in court for the first time, charged with the murder of Kumanjayi Little Baby near Alice Springs.
The US and Iran exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf, reigniting the Hormuz crisis and causing oil prices to jump to $115, while also drawing in the United Arab Emirates.
The flare-up of violence between the US and Iran in the Persian Gulf has disrupted a four-week ceasefire, leading to concerns about renewed strikes on Iranian targets and increased inflation risks.
Experts suggest Iran may seek retaliation against senior figures following the US-Israeli war, indicating a potential escalation of its covert war on opponents abroad.
